turns.q: I placed an order a few days ago and still have no tracking — where is it?

Could you please provide your order number and the email address you used to place the order? This will help me look up your shipment and see if tracking is available.

turns.q: How long does it normally take to ship and send a tracking number?
turns.replyTail: the order? This will help me look up your shipment and see if tracking is available.You saidHow long does it normally take to ship and send a tracking number?Agent saidMost items ship within one to four business days. Once your product has shipped, you'll get a confirmation email with tracking info. Delivery usually takes 3–9 business days via UPS, but it can take longer during holidays or severe weather.If you’d like, I can check your order status—just share your order number and email address!

If you chose In-Home Delivery and Setup, it usually takes 2–4 weeks. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

turns.q: Is there any way to speed it up if I need it sooner?
turns.replyTail: s 2–4 weeks. Is there anything else I can help you with today?You saidIs there any way to speed it up if I need it sooner?Agent saidUnfortunately, Casper cannot expedite orders. All shipments follow standard delivery timelines: 3–9 business days via UPS, or 2–4 weeks for In-Home Delivery and Setup. If you need your order urgently, you might consider checking for availability at a local Casper retail store. Would you like help finding a store near you, or is there anything else I can assist with?

turns.q: What should I do if the tracking never updates?
turns.replyTail: u, or is there anything else I can assist with?You saidWhat should I do if the tracking never updates?Agent saidIf your tracking never updates, it’s usually because the package missed an initial scan or is waiting for UPS pickup. This is pretty common, and tracking updates often appear within 1–2 business days of your expected arrival date.If it’s been more than three days with no movement, I can transfer you to a live agent for further assistance. Would you like to be connected to a specialist?

turns.q: How do I find my tracking link?
turns.replyTail: nsfer you to a live agent for further assistance. Would you like to be connected to a specialist?You saidHow do I find my tracking link?Agent saidOnce your order ships, you’ll receive a confirmation email with your tracking link. You can also view your tracking information by logging into your Casper account and checking your order history here: Casper website.If you’d like, I can look up your tracking link for you—just provide your order number and the email address you used to place the order!
